zh.Pott Shrigley, Cheshire, England: 英國爾波特 史利格利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Fitton於1253年5月29日之前出生在英國爾時，她的父親Hugh Fitton30歲，母親Lady Ellen Margaret Joyce48歲。她於大約1280年與Robert de Downes在英國爾波特 史利格利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1307年在英國越可爾巴斯利。

zh-hans.Pott Shrigley, Cheshire, England: 英国爾波特 史利格利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Fitton于1253年5月29日之前出生在英国爾时，她的父亲Hugh Fitton30岁，母亲Lady Ellen Margaret Joyce48岁。她于大约1280年与Robert de Downes在英国爾波特 史利格利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1307年在英国越可爾巴斯利。

nameMeanings.name: Fitton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English fiton, fittin ‘lie, falsehood’, for a lier or cheat.

possibly a habitational name from Fitton Hall in Leverington, Cambridgeshire, named in Anglo-Scandinavian as ‘settlement by the meadow-land’, from Old English tūn + Old Norse fit, a term denoting grassland on the bank of a river.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Fitton was born before 29 May 1253, in Cheshire, England, her father, Hugh Fitton, was 30 and her mother, Lady Ellen Margaret Joyce, was 48. She married Robert de Downes about 1280, in Pott Shrigley, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1307, in Barnsley, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Fitton est née avant 29 mai 1253, à Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Fitton, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Ellen Margaret Joyce, avait 48 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Downes environ 1280, à Pott Shrigley, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1307, à Barnsley, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Fitton vor 29. Mai 1253 in Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh Fitton 30 und ihre Mutter Lady Ellen Margaret Joyce 48. Sie hat um 1280 in Pott Shrigley, Cheshire, England Robert de Downes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1307 in Barnsley, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Fitton è nata il prima del 29 maggio 1253 nel Cheshire, England, sua padre, Hugh Fitton, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Lady Ellen Margaret Joyce, aveva 48 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Downes circa 1280, nel Pott Shrigley, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1307, nel Barnsley, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Fittonが1253年5月29日以前にイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Hugh Fittonは30歳，母Lady Ellen Margaret Joyceは48歳であった。約1280年にイギリスチェシュアイアポット シュリグリーでRobert de Downesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1307年にイギリスヨークシュアイアバーンスリーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Fitton(이)가 1253년 5월 29일 이전 영국 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Fitton(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Ellen Margaret Joyce(은)는 48세였다. 그녀는 대략 1280년 영국 체실르 포트 슈리글리에서 Robert de Downes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1307년 영국 요르크실르 바른슬리에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Fitton nasceu antes 29 de maio de 1253, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Fitton, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Ellen Margaret Joyce, tinha 48 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Downes aproximadamente 1280, em Pott Shrigley, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1307, em Barnsley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Fitton родилась перед 29 май 1253 г. в местности чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh Fitton было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Ellen Margaret Joyce, 48. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Downes около 1280 г. в местности потт шригли, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1307 г. в местности барнсли, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Fitton nació antes de 29 de mayo de 1253, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh Fitton, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lady Ellen Margaret Joyce, tenía 48 años. Se casó con Robert de Downes aproximadamente 1280, en Pott Shrigley, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1307, en Barnsley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
